description_long: This is a dark-colored, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and elliptical wings, reminiscent of classic World War II fighter aircraft. The wings are low-mounted and feature roundels with blue and white markings near the tips, adding a distinctive visual element. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and is positioned just behind the propeller, suggesting a single-seat configuration. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with a tailwheel visible beneath. The surface of the airplane appears metallic and slightly glossy, with some weathering or reflective highlights. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear is in a taildragger configuration, with the main wheels under the wings and a small wheel at the tail.
description: A dark, single-propeller airplane with elliptical low-mounted wings, blue and white roundels, and an enclosed cockpit. The design is sleek and metallic, with a classic taildragger landing gear and a streamlined fuselage.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full span of the elliptical wings, tailwheel, and the vertical and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the cockpit canopy, propeller, and the roundel on the wing and fuselage.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the propeller, nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical wing shape.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the cockpit, propeller, and roundels, mirroring the left-side features.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight elliptical wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main wheels under the wings and a single tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy just behind the propeller.
